summary: Engineering change order remove tied inputs.
description: Engineering change order remove tied inputs.

options.name: -base_cells
options.description: buffer cells to be used for fixing ((libCell/ptnCell)+, optional)

options.name: -ignore_base_cells
options.description: ignore any instances of these cells from fixing ((libCell/ptnCell)+, optional)

options.name: -ignore_insts
options.description: ignore these instances from fixing ((inst)+, optional)

options.name: -insts
options.description: only fix these instances (default all design minus ignored instances/cells) ((inst)+, optional)

options.name: -relaxed_placement
options.description: accept moves even if instances cannot be placed

options.name: -report
options.description: only report existing tied inputs, but no fixing by any method

options.name: -state
options.description: {prePlace preCTS postCTS postRoute} current design state

options.name: -verbose
options.description: increase the detail of reports and fixing details
